claimText: The Major Dhyan Chand Award, instituted in 2002, is India's highest honour for lifetime achievements in sports.
evidenceExcerpt: the Major Dhyan Chand Award represents India's highest honour for lifetime achievements in sports. Presented for good performance and contributing towards the promotion of sports in an individual capacity since 2002
examUse: Statement-based question on the purpose and inception year of National Sports Awards.
distractorHooks: Highest honour for a single spectacular performance rather than lifetime achievement

claimText: The Maulana Abul Kalam Azad (MAKA) Trophy, instituted in 1956-1957, is the oldest National Sports Award in India.
evidenceExcerpt: The oldest National Sports Award in India, the Maulana Abul Kalam Azad Trophy or the MAKA Trophy was instituted in 1956–1957.
examUse: Fact-based question identifying the oldest sports award in India.
distractorHooks: Arjuna Award is the oldest National Sports Award

claimText: The MAKA Trophy is awarded to an institution or university for top performance in inter-university tournaments over the last one year.
evidenceExcerpt: It is given to an institution or university for top performance in inter-university tournaments over the last one year.
examUse: Statement-based question on the eligibility criteria for the MAKA Trophy.
distractorHooks: Awarded to the best performing State in National Games
Awarded to individual athletes for university-level performance

claimText: The Rashtriya Khel Protsahan Puraskar evaluates the role of organisations, corporates, and individuals in sports promotion over the preceding three years.
evidenceExcerpt: Awarded to organisations or corporates (both private and public) and individuals for playing a role in the area of sports promotion and development over the last three years
examUse: Statement-based question testing the evaluation timeframe and eligible entities for the award.
distractorHooks: Evaluates performance over the last one year
Awarded exclusively to public sector enterprises

claimText: The Rashtriya Khel Protsahan Puraskar explicitly recognizes the encouragement of sports through Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) as one of its award segments.
evidenceExcerpt: Nominees are decided in four different segments: ... Encouragement to sports through corporate social responsibility
examUse: Feature-based question on the integration of CSR with national sports promotion awards.
distractorHooks: CSR contributions are excluded from National Sports Awards
Only recognizes direct employment of sportspersons, not general CSR
